content: Self-Refine’s single-model iterative self-feedback loop can be augmented by LLM self-reflection mechanisms that pull insights from inconsistent, multiple problem-solving perspectives to create a hybrid two-stage self-refinement system. This hybrid framework preserves Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data, while resolving the common failure mode of single-perspective self-feedback where models repeatedly reinforce their own initial blind spots.
